haikus.haiku:
Olive in the glass,
Chilled whispers of gin delight,
Cheers to joy today!
Happy #NationalMartiniDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunlight warms the field,
Voices rise like sweet spring winds,
Hope blooms in each heart.
Happy #Juneteenth from @ClamBakeSanta

Laughter fills the room,
Cake and joy, sweet scents entwined,
Time to celebrate!
#HappyBirthdayBlaisePascal from @ClamBakeSanta
